title: docs: update README — 2026-05-22
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News + Recent Apps sections.

gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot gave the README its daily polish, updating the latest news and recent community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to refresh the Latest News and Recent Apps sections.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will see the most up-to-date community apps and news.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot and the bee mascot updating a giant digital billboard or wooden notice board with new pixel art posters, representing the daily news update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute robot with a CRT monitor head and the bee mascot pinning new pixelated posters to a wooden community notice board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
